revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:少初位]][[zh:少初位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:少初位]][[zh:少初位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:少初位]][[zh:少初位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:少初位]][[zh:少初位]]
{{ill|Junior Initial Rank|ja|少初位|1=Junior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Initial Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Initial Rank|qq=}} are a bit weird to me as english translations go towards this form despite the fact that they do not use different words than the junior senior dichotomy. However using Greater/Lesser here to correspond to wikidata and translations I found in English[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:04, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''Minor Initial Rank''' (Shōshoi, 少初位) is one of the {{ill|Court Ranks in Japan|ja|位階|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Court Ranks of Japan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It is the lowest Rank, beneath {{ill|Senior Initial Rank|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}}.<ref>https://www.wakapoetry.net/background/society/court-offices-titles-and-Ranks/court-Ranks/</ref>
== Overview ==
Under the {{ill|Ritsuryō|en|Ritsuryō|qid=Q742460|lt=Ritsuryō system|1=Ritsuryō}}, 少初位 was further divided into two sub-Ranks: 少初位上 (Shōshoi-jō) and 少初位下 (Shōshoi-ge). The Rank corresponded to positions such as the {{ill|Shuyōshi|ja|主鷹司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuyōshi|1=Q11368805|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11368805}}'s 令史 (clerks), {{ill|Sakan (Kokushi)|ja|目 (国司)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakan (Kokushi)|qq=}} (regional inspectors) in lower provinces, 三品家書吏 (scribes for third-Rank families), 四品家書吏 (scribes for fourth-Rank families), 職事二位家大書吏 (senior scribes for second-Rank families in official roles), 職事二位家少書吏 (junior scribes for the same Rank), and 職事三位家書吏 (scribes for third-Rank families in official roles).
In the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}}, distinctions between the upper and lower sub-Ranks were abolished. Furthermore, the {{ill|Shokuinryō|ja|職員令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shokuinryō|qq=}} of {{ill|August 22, 1869|ja|1869th year 8月22日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 22, 1869|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref group="notes">The Cabinet Records Bureau's "Independent Book: Meiji Official Ranks History, Section on Offices" (National Archives of Japan ref.A07090183000) states it was established on {{ill|July 8 (Lunisolar)|ja|Lunisolar July8日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 8 (Lunisolar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and revised on {{ill|August 20 (Lunisolar)|ja|Lunisolar August20日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 20 (Lunisolar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.</ref> eliminated corresponding offices for this Rank.<ref>[{{NDLDC|787949/168}} 法令全書「明治2nd year 」], National Diet Library.</ref>
In the honors system established by the {{ill|Joi Jōrei|ja|叙位条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Joi Jōrei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Imperial Edict No. 10 of 1887) and later the {{ill|Ikai-ryō|ja|位階令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikai-ryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 位階|1=Court Ranks in Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q99196082}} (Imperial Edict No. 325 of 1926), no equivalent to this Rank was included.
== Notes ==
=== Notes === {{Reflist|group="notes"}}
=== References === {{Reflist}}
== External links ==
[https://laws.e-gov.go.jp/document?lawid=215IO0000000325 位階令] - {{ill|e-Gov Law Search|ja|e-Gov法令検索|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/e-Gov Law Search|qq=}} [{{NDLDC|787949/168}} 官位相当表] - National Diet Library Digital Archive

{{translated page|ja|少初位|version=103190295|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior First Rank|ja|従一位|1=Junior First Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior First Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior First Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Second Rank|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Second Rank|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Third Rank|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Third Rank|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank|ja|正六位|1=Senior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Seventh Rank|ja|正七位|1=Senior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Seventh Rank|ja|従七位|1=Junior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Seventh Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Seventh Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Eighth Rank|ja|正八位|1=Senior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Eighth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Eighth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Eighth Rank|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Ninth Rank|ja|正九位|1=Senior Ninth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Ninth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Ninth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Ninth Rank|ja|従九位|1=Junior Ninth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Ninth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Ninth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Initial Rank|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Minor Initial Rank|ja|少初位|1=Minor Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Initial Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Initial Rank|qq=}} endRanklist--><!--Minor Initial Rank--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh:少初位]] {{wikidata link|Q11464527}} [[Category:Court Ranks of Japan]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
